entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Re: Can Overview Page use OData v4 to configure analysis...
entry.content: Our backend service is not based on CAP or RAP. We use Olingo to expose an OData server. When creating the SAP Fiori application, we chose the "Connect to an OData Service" option.

entry.title: Re: 有关系统更新相关问题
entry.content: 您好， 一般只有主版本的升级会有生产系统停机（一年两次，停机时间都在周末凌晨）。 具体可参考以下两个文档。 SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, 3-System Landscape – Upgrade & Maintenance Schedule https://www.sap.com/documents/2021/09/58ffa59e-f97d-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html SAP S/4HANA Cloud​ - Software Lifecycle Management for Customers​ https://www.sap.com/documents/2022/12/26c42391-5a7e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

entry.title: Re: Tansfer balance between one customer to another customer via API

entry.title: Re: Starter system can't creat request
entry.content:
Hi，

请确保在此窗口不要更改弹出的用户名称。

另外如果还是保存失败，可以在“ Export customizing transports" 里创建好TR，再来配置里选择。

entry.title: Re: Time evaluation period is different from payroll period
entry.content:
Hello

I just start implementing time evaluation and the time has different period it’s start from 17 to 16 next month and payroll from 01 to 30 

B2 cluster and ZL table just imported data only from 01 to 16 

can you help me how to make B2 and ZL imported as per time evaluation period from 17 to 16

entry.title: How to connect SAC agent to Solution manager
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

We want to connect our SAC agent to solution manager ,could you please guide us for the managed system setup. Is it going to be similar as other systems where we install install DAA and perform the RZ70  SLD configuration followed by managed system setup. Please check and advice us on the same.

Thanks & Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to connect SAC agent to Solution manager
entry.content:
Dear customer,

A SAC agent cannot be pushed through the SLD like ABAP or JAVA systems. To understand what types of technical systems can be sent to SLD or LMDB in SAP Solution Manager, it is recommended to refer to the Maintenance of Product in the System Landscape and Known Data Suppliers.

Best regards,
Sylas
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: No of Same Work Center
entry.content: Thank you Dominik Tylczynski, Could you please elaborate how to configure this in the system, and how costing and scheduling can be managed Thank you.

entry.title: How do I debug an ALV that was processed in the background?
entry.content:
I have custom program that can generate an ALV in foreground. It can also generate an ALV in background that can viewed in SM37.

I have an issue with the column optimization when the ALV is processed or viewed in SM37.

As seen in the picture below, the column "Description" is not aligned from top to bottom. 

Is the custom program also responsible for the construction of the ALV in SM37? While the ALV columns does not have problems when processed in foreground, I have debugged it and to construct the ALV in foreground, it uses the FM REUSE_ALV_BLOCK_LIST_APPEND.

entry.title: Material Ledger
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

After ML settlement when I am reviewing the Accounting entry of Movement Type 601, 602 & 653 below Accounting entries I have found.

Case 1BSXStock of SFG ManufacturedDr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
    
Case 2GBBCOGS SFGDr.
 UMBGain/Loss on Stock Revaluation SFGDr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGDr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGDr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 COCRevaluation STD V ACTUAL SFGCr.
 BSXStock of SFG ManufacturedDr.
    
Case 3Same as 2nd No Case multiple PRY is there but UMB is not there
    
Case 4GBBCOGS SFGDr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 COCRevaluation STD V ACTUAL SFGDr.
    
Case 5GBBCOGS SFGCr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGDr.
 COCRevaluation STD V ACTUAL SFGDr.
    
Case 6GBBCOGS SFGDr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGCr.
 PRYPrice Diff Sett. Trans to Next Level SFGDr.
 COCRevaluation STD V ACTUAL SFGDr.

Why each and every cases Accounting entries has been changed. Please make me understand with proper logic.

1. In Case 1, only BSX & PRY is there with one Dr. line item and one Cr. line item.

2. In case 2, GBB, UMB, COC, BSX with one line item and PRY with multiple line item with Dr. and Cr.

3. In case 3, Same as 2nd case GBB, COC, BSX with one line item and PRY with multiple line item with Dr. and Cr. but UMB is not there.

4. In case 4, GBB with Dr. COC with Dr. both PRY line item with Cr.

5. In case 5, GBB with Cr. COC with Dr. PRY with 2 Cr. line item and 1 Dr. line item.

6. In case 6, GBB with Dr. COC with Dr. PRY with 2 Cr. line item and 1 Dr. line item.

Thanks.

Deb

entry.title: The detailed production orders information of WIP ATY
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have enabled the 33Q.

I post WIP quantity document , and  run the Actual costing ledger run of 2024/006.

In Material Price Analysis , I find the priceDiff of  WIP 2024/005 ATY ,  I want to know what specific production orders do they come from . But I can't find the report.

I select the WIP 2024/005 ATY row ,and click the button source document . But it just show how many hour ,no detailed production orders information .

 

How I can find  what specific production orders do they come from ? Any APP or report ?

entry.title: Re: Could not get the ApiHub resource data
Possibility to block users using old SAP GUI version
entry.content:
From the title itself, is there any possibility to block users using old SAP GUI version? There is mandatory advisory to the users to install the SAP GUI 8.0 version (from SAP 7.5 which is out of support) but most of them still using the old one for multiple reminders and deadline. 

If there is an option e.g custom ABAP program, this will force the user to install the latest version.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Duplicate Registered Product ID Creation i...
entry.content:
Dear Ali Rahmatallah,

Here is the introduction of Serial Number, you can find in the Help Portal: Working with Serial Number.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Serial numbers are unique identifiers that you can assign to a single item of a tangible product. They are used to differentiate that item from other items of the same product. A serial number identifies a particular item that enables you to distinguish between individual pieces.

Since serial numbers are only unique per reference material, two different reference materials could have the same serial number.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Therefore, what you encountered is a standard system behavior.

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: popup with continue and cancel buttons
entry.content:
Hello,

We have an app developed using restful abap. In the object page we have few address fields. On click of a custom action called 'Validate address' we would like to validate the address ( we have an API that does this) and show the corrected / suggested address in a popup with 'Continue' and 'Cancel' buttons. Where user will select 'Continue' to accept the suggested address or 'Cancel' . Wondering if this kind of popup is possible using RAP. If not,  any suggestions for a workaround would be greatly appreciated. thanks

entry.title: Publishing contents
entry.content: I'm am trying to export one of my objects. Previously I can see the object under the 'All Content' tag in Manager. But now the object doesn't appear, it only appears when I chose the 'Published' tag. I am unable to export the object now because I cannot release the editing keys as it only appears when the "Published" tag is selected.

entry.title: Service sheet reversal from S4 HANA to Ariba
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are having a unique scenario linking time entry process in S4 and service entry sheets creation in S4 and linking the SES into Ariba ( since all purchase requisition to Invoicing is happening in Ariba).

Sequential steps.

1. Create Ariba Service PR with child line items in Ariba upon approval the requisition is converted to a purchase order in ERP and PO number is sent to Ariba Network via Ariba Buying. ( The worker information is captured at the Purchase order level)

2. Contingent workers will enter time in custom solution developed over S4 HANA and time entry is made in S4 HANA and approved in S4 HANA

3. Approved time entries are converted into the service entry sheets in S4 HANA and exported into Ariba ( we are having commodity code mapping issue for imported SES) which Ariba team is looking into the issue

challenge - For time entry reversals in S4 HANA, SAP creates the Reversal SES with return indicator and new SES with corrected value, we also have the initial SES in Ariba before reversal. 

Note - we have reached out to our SAP Shared services team, raised a case and we haven't got any valid response apart from sharing the CIG guide.

we are looking for a process how ERP SES reversals are integrated with Ariba so that we can look into enhancement options to fulfil end to end requirements.

Observations.

1. The reversal SES generated in ERP payload doesn't have any indicator or negative value since system is trying to create reversal SES also as a new SES in Ariba.

Example - Original approved time entry created - SES 1

Time entry reversal - SES 2 ( with returns indicator)

Corrected Time entry - SES 3

entry.title: Can SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office import data from Group Reporting on premise?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Can SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office import data from S/4HANA for Group Reporting, On Premise?

As far as I understand, there are 3 different editions (options) for Analysis Office.
1) SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office - Standard Edition
2) SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office - Edition for SAP Analytics Cloud
3) SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office

My question is regarding option 3.
I know that option 1 can import data from S/4HANA for Group Reporting, On Premise.
My assumption is that option 3 can only import data from S/4HANA Public Cloud. 
Is my understanding correct?
If so, is there a roadmap to support the live connection with S/4HANA Group Reporting OP?

I found this roadmap: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73555000100800001621&range=FIRST-LAST#;INNO=11B16179D5801EEE81BBE40F2F05C5AB
Does this mean live connection with S/4HANA OP is already supported with option 3?
(This roadmap does not seem to mention whether Cloud or OP...)

Thanks and Regards,

entry.title: mass-change Business Partners
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Good day.

I would like to inquire about mass-changing Business Partners. Is the app "Start Mass Maintenance - Business Partners" suitable for this purpose? If so, could you please provide guidance on how to prepare the import file?

Additionally, can I use the "Start Mass Maintenance - Business Partners" app to create a vendor role for an existing BP number?

Thank you very much for your assistance.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: When I used to Upload the Crystal report in SAP business One via Report and Layout Import Wizard
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you considered using the addon in Crystal for SAP Business One?

entry.title: Re: Attach database is not working SQL SAP Business One
entry.content: When you are attaching the file, are your ensuring you rename this new database name. It will rename the file. If you are just simply attaching as the same file. it its clashing the existing database.

entry.title: Opening direct links for published simulations from SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have recorded and published simulations in SAP Enable Now (SEN) work area. For each Simulation, we have the direct link to access and view the simulations. We have shared these direct links with the users, already configured in SEN.

When a user clicks the direct link for any simulation, they are first taken to the SEN page and not the simulation screen directly. Strangely, when the user clicks the link second time again, then Simulation screen opens directly. 

Any reason why this happens? Am I missing anything?

entry.title: Re: Improve Spartacus and OCC performance with CMS Rendering Cache

Very informative @YannickRobin . Appreciate the level of details.

Could you please explain further on "Maybe the target group should be part of the key when personalization is activated." Which target group you mean?. Struggling to get the components cached with restrictions on.  Please help

SAP Commerce Cloud

BR Frank

Your Input Year month should be Date filter. Rest all can accomplished using dynamic time restricted measures.

 

Previous Month: Make the selection as below

entry.title: Re: BADI for SAP EWM after Confirm and save WT in program /SCWM/SAPLUI_TO_CONF
entry.content:
I solved this problem. The BADI wasn't triggered because new data is required before the WT is confirmed. The program skips this BADI under certain conditions, such as when the WT is confirmed.

Thank you again, @DominikTylczyn, for confirming that this is the correct BADI.

Best regards,
Tedi

entry.title: Re: is it possible to install SAP Cloud ALM no cloud but on-promise (security defense requires it)?
entry.content:
I guess it's called "SAP Cloud ALM" because there's no on-premise version.

I'm quoting the "Setup and Administration for SAP Cloud ALM" guide: "SAP Cloud ALM is a cloud-based application lifecycle management offering that allows you to implement and operate your cloud solutions."

 

You can find more information here:
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/usage-rights.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/about?locale=en-US

 

BR Frank

entry.title: Late coming salary deduction in sap time off?
entry.content: Is there any functionality in sap system to deduct employee salary after three late arrivals from payroll in time off sap?

entry.title: 🟣 S/4HANA Extensions: Start Fast with the New Extensibility Wizard
entry.content:
Accelerate your side-by-side extension development with contextual navigation from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Build. Learn how the new extensibility wizard in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition identifies context-based extension points and provides direct access to on-stack as well as side-by-side extensions in SAP Build on SAP BTP.

Speakers:

  • Karthik Thirunavukkarasan
  • Seshadri Ramanarayanan

Karthik is a product manager in SAP Build focusing on S/4HANA extensibility. He has 15 years' experience working with various SAP technologies as a consultant, developer, product manager. Apart from SAP, he is also passionate about sports especially badminton and cricket.

Seshadri is a senior product manager with SAP Build Process Automation, focusing on decisions / business rules, SAP S/4HANA extensibility and workflows/process. At SAP for over 17 years, Sesh has been a speaker at numerous conferences like Sapphire, TechEd, and bpmNext, sharing his knowledge in the area of process automation.

entry.title: Re: How to Add multiple Transport Request in import Queue with Script.

entry.title: Re: Success Factors Onboarding - Recruiter can´t see Onbo...
entry.content: Hi, we are facing a issue that the candidate name on recruiting is different and when we check on onboarding it is different but when we open New hire data, it shows the correct first name and last name, even in reports the name from recruiting appears but when we check the process and onboarding dashboard the name is different, has anyone faced this issue

entry.title: 🟣 Guided Experiences with SAP Build Process Automation and Work Zone
entry.content:
In this session, explore how to model a process in SAP Build Process Automation and then design a wizard experience – with widgets, cards and more – to be displayed to users in SAP Build Work Zone. The result? An interactive, personalized experience – all integrated seamlessly.

Speaker: 

  • Sruthi Chiramel
  • Florian Buech

Sruthi, a senior product manager for SAP Build, comes from a cross-functional background as she has been an electrical engineer, developer and statistician, among other roles. In her free time, she usually dances away her worries and finds solace spending time in nature.

Florian is a product manager in the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) area, focusing on SAP Build Work Zone.

entry.title: New Last Indicator Value features in Line Monitor POD with release SAP Digital Manufacturing 2408
entry.content:
With release 2408 of SAP Digital Manufacturing, the Line Monitor plugin for Last Indicator Value is enhanced to enable

  • use of multiple plugin instances to group selected indicators and to label plugin header
  • configuration of indicator color leveraging pre-defined value state colors
  • selection of pre-defined icons for single value indicators
  • configuring sequence of indicator exposure
  • configuring spacing between indicator cards
  • custom extension to adopt indicator value, UoM, or color value state

Within the POD Designer application of SAP Digital Manufacturing you can now assign multiple instances of the Last Indicator Value plugin for Line Monitor PODs. This new feature will allow you to group selected indicators in individual plugin instances and provide a custom label to be exposed at runtime. If you do not require to have the asset name exposed within the plugin, you can set the "Hide Asset Headers" parameter to "On".

If applicable, you can select an indicator to be exposed in multiple plugin instances for Last Indicator Value.

When configuring Last Indicator Value at design time, you can now select a default color for each indicator from the set of value state colors.

In addition, for each indicator with view mode "Last Value", you can select one of the pre-defined icons to be exposed at runtime.

Furthermore, you can adopt the spacing between the individual indicator cards displayed at runtime.

In the configuration popup you will find two dedicated tabs for "Last Value Indicators" and "Multi-Value Indicators", where the selected indicators are listed according to their "View Mode". Within each tab you can adopt the sequence of indicators to be exposed at runtime by simply using drag&drop feature within the list of indicators.

An example of a potential exposure at runtime you can find below. Two instances of the plugin are being used, the first hiding the asset header.

Individual values, unit of measures, and color value state, can be overwritten leveraging custom extension point. The extension point as well as sample code can be found at Extension Samples .

The API to post the last indicator value will be enhanced to validate the input value against the data type that is defined for the indicator in the asset model. The API will reject values if there is a data type mismatch, such as when a string is posted for an indicator with numeric data type. If the data type as such is matching, but the format is not exactly correct, the API will accept the value if it does not lead to inconsistent information. Examples:

  • an indicator is defined as string of 10 characters. A string value is posted with 15 characters. The API will accept the value but only expose the first 10 characters in the Line Monitor plugin
  • an indicator is defined as numeric with 7 digits and 2 decimals. A value is posted with 6 digits including 3 decimals (like 110.345). The API will accept the value but only expose the first two decimals (here 110.34)

For indicators with assigned code list, the API will only accept values that match one of the defined codes. The code value posted will be transformed and its description will be exposed in Line Monitor. 

Final remark, independent of the new features coming with 2408: Last Indicator Value plugin will not be auto-refreshed as defined in the configuration of the Line Monitor Selection plugin. Instead, new values posted via the Last Indicator Value API will be immediately reflected in the respective plugin.

entry.title: 🟣 Develop Even Faster (!) with SAP Build Apps Templates
entry.content:
See how to leverage SAP Build Apps Templates (in the SAP Build Store) to kickstart your projects. In this session, Burak will select a template and create a full-stack application, utilizing SAP Build Code to develop an SAP Cloud Application Programming Model backend, and SAP Build Apps to develop the frontend. Join us to see how these tools and new templates can streamline your development and enable you to build robust applications efficiently.

Speaker: Burak Demir

Burak is a product manager for SAP Build, specializing in application development, especially with his favorite SAP Build product, SAP Build Apps. Outside of my professional life, I'm an aviation enthusiast and food lover, often traveling solely for the joy of new flight experiences and culinary adventures.

entry.title: 🟣 Boost Development with GenAI in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Boost your Enterprise Automation by diving into the embedded Generative AI features within SAP Build Process Automation. Gain hands-on experience with tools that let you generate, edit, and summarize processes, decisions, forms, and more — simply by using natural language descriptions.

Speaker: Miguel Angel Meza Martinez

Miguel is a senior product manager at SAP Build, focusing on planning and executing the integration of AI capabilities into SAP Build Process Automation. He started his career at SAP in 2018 as a PhD student in the Business Process Management (BPM) team working on implementation of proof-of-concept AI use cases for the workflow management solution. Outside work, Miguel likes to hike and ride his bike in nature, listen to music and podcasts, and dance.

entry.title: Re: How to create a list of SAP HANA parameters
entry.content:
Can you please check following SAP Knowledge Base Article:

2186744 - FAQ: SAP HANA Parameters

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Create new data provider for Funds Management Reconciliation
entry.content:
I'm building a Reconciliation Rule (FMFGRCN_DEF_RULE) for Funds Management. 

However, the listed providers for Data Slices do not have Profit Centre as a field for data selection.

Is it possible to add a field in a existing data provider? If not, how do I create a new data provider?

entry.title: Re: CPI Message mapping problems with arrays
entry.content:
I have tried that now, but it seems the behaviour is the following:
1) I made dealerNumber 0 to 1 and mapped dealers -> dealerNumber only but like this it does not map the dealers at all.

2) I mapped dealers to to_dealernr and also to dealerNumber but in this case I have the same behaviour as before .. just that only 1 dealer number is present in the dealerNumber field .. 

Could I achieve the proper result with a groovy script ? 
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Stacked Bar/Column chart example using VizFrame in UI5.
entry.content: i have copy paste the code but at the end chart is not displaying ?

entry.title: Re: How do I modify a field of BSEG in FB01? Substitution...
entry.content:
Hi

Basically on certain fields are allowed to change in Substitution. You can check which in table GB01. Please also read note 42615. 

However you can modify the system in order to allow substitution of fields that is not allowed from SAP side. You can also read the "rules" for this in the note (just after "Solution"). 

Point is: BSEG-FDTAG is basically not allowed to change. And it´s not mentioned in the note. But you can try to remove the BEXCLUDE flag in table GB01 (Entry 009 S BSEG FDTAG). Then it should be possible - but please remember, that by this you are entering the "rules of modification" 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to enable a grayed/Disable field in SAP MDG-S?
entry.content:
Hello, I believe this issue is resolved.
But if you are still facing the same issue, you can check the CR level settings,
Under the CR type>Configure CR Steps>Entity>Attributes - you can check for the settings you filed might be in 'Not Relevant' state, set that to 'Standard' or 'No Require Field Check' based on your business Requirement.

I think it's worth giving a try 🙂

entry.title: 🟣 Chatbot Development Made Easy with SAP AI Core and Build Apps
entry.content:
Integrate SAP AI Core with SAP Build Apps to build a custom Chatbot. Show how AI Core can be connected from Build Apps. Show few customization options while creating the user interface and launch the app to demonstrate the newly created chatbot providing answers to the questions.

Speaker:

  • D R Rekha
  • Shrinivasan Neelamegam

Rekha is a Developer Advocate at SAP, focusing on SAP Build topics. Previously, she worked as an ABAP developer.

Shrinivasan is a developer advocate at SAP, focusing on SAP Build and CAP topics. At SAP, he has been part of development teams for SAP Build, SAP Fiori Elements, and SAP Business Network. Previously, Shrini worked as a web developer on the JavaScript stack. Outside work, he likes playing tennis and keeping tabs on current affairs.

entry.title: Explode BOM with previous or new production version?
entry.content:
Dear Expert:

We are doing system conversion from ECC 6 to S4 HANA. As the production version is mandatory in S4. we create PV for BOM header material. After that to create sub contracting PO, if we click the "Explode BOM" button in Item-->Material Data view, a window pop-up with message" Previous production version differs from prod. version 0001. Explode BOM with previous or new production version?" Is it possible to stop this message pop-up?

Best Regards

entry.title: 🟣 Set Up Rules for Who Can Create and Transport SAP Build Projects
entry.content:
In this session, you'll see how to use 2 key features for adding governance to SAP Build. First, a brand new feature lets you create processes (yes, with SAP Build Process Automation!) to enforce who can create SAP Build projects and who can request to transport projects to QA and Prod. Second, learn how to set up true Dev/QA/Prod environments for SAP Build Apps projects and to enable transport between those tenants.

Speaker: Dinesh Singh

Dinesh is a product manager specializing in SAP Build, with a focus on governance and actions. He brings approximately 15 years of experience in various SAP technologies, having held roles as a consultant, solution architect and product manager. Outside of work, he enjoys playing soccer and cricket, and at home, he is an avid fan of Marvel movies.

entry.title: 🟣 Extend Joule with Your Own Skills
entry.content:
Extend Joule, SAP’s business-oriented AI copilot, so that it responds to your custom prompts and can perform actions that you define. Using the SAP Build's low-code design environment, define new skills for Joule, such as updating an invoice so user’s can simply ask Joule to “add a discount to this invoice”. We will also share potential use cases that may be of interest to you, as well as our vision for integrating advanced Generative AI capabilities and AI agents.

Speaker: 

  • Miguel Angel Meza Martinez
  • Fred Vanborre

Miguel is a senior product manager at SAP Build, focusing on planning and executing the integration of AI capabilities into SAP Build Process Automation. He started his career at SAP in 2018 as a PhD student in the Business Process Management (BPM) team working on implementation of proof-of-concept AI use cases for the workflow management solution. Outside work, Miguel likes to hike and ride his bike in nature, listen to music and podcasts, and dance.

Fred Vanborre is a product owner at SAP, focusing on SAP Build Process Automation generative AI capabilities. He has worked at SAP for more than 20 years mainly in product management and engineering.

entry.title: 🟣 Putting It All Together: S/4HANA Retail Pricing App Using SAP Build, AI, Event Mesh and More
entry.content:
In this session, we’ll build an application for real-time retail sales events (“flash sales”). Using SAP Build Code with SAP Joule, we’ll create a backend service that can broadcast pricing updates to electronic store shelf labels, creating real-time sales events. We’ll use SAP Build Process Automation to automate pricing approvals and orchestrate the real-time action. Also part of the solution: SAP Build Work Zone, Event Mesh, SAP Build Apps and Fiori Elements.

Speaker: Eric Solberg

entry.title: Re: No of Same Work Center
entry.content:
Hello @raviram08 

Number of capacities is maintained in work center master, on capacity level:

See the note 2600113 - Workcenter capacity fields cannot be edited if you can't edit the field.

The impact on the scheduling is that an operation can be executed in parallel on individual capacities / machines of a work center. Maximum number of machines used for an operation is defined in a routing operation details as maximum splits.

Bear in mind that ultimately both costing and scheduling depend on formulas and these are often heavily customized.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP webi formula to calculate the hours and minutes b...
entry.content:
I am appreciating for your efforts.

I used your formula in this link and obtained the correct result 4.33.22.

Solved: Convert Solid number to 00:00:00 format - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Custom code adaptation for SAP S/4HANA - FAQ
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this! Will take this as reference document.

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting with chargeable components
entry.content:
Hi Kidd,

Thank you for raising this question.

The subcontracting solution (Subcontracting with Chargeable Components solution) specifically for Japan, which is available in the on-premise version, is currently not available in S4 Hana Public Cloud. It is unknown whether it will be made available in the Public Cloud in the future. We have checked the roadmap for upcoming releases and no note of it, and there is no indication that it will be added as of this date.

We regret that this information may not meet your expectations.

Kind Regards,
Evol

entry.title: Re: CKR1 timing issue
entry.content: Hi Darrell, do you already have an s-user? Maybe you need to contact your support service to grant you access. I hope this helps. Kind regards, Jessica

entry.title: Re: In-process inspection result recording mandatory before operation wise production order confirma
entry.content:
In configuration "define confirmation parameter" make operation sequence "error when operation sequence is not adhered" and results record (QM) "Error message if no inspection results exist" for QM results recording mandatory against the production order type.

 Each inspection character will have different accepted and rejected qty. Hence, automate the confirmation based on inspection results recording might not be a good approach.

entry.title: A class already exists with the name "LCL_CUSTOM_HEADER"
entry.content:
Below is my code to define a class. When I activate it, it has error message : A class already exists with the name "LCL_CUSTOM_HEADER". And I can see there are two class with same name in the function group. Why?

CLASS lcl_custom_header DEFINITION
      INHERITING FROM cl_foreign_application_view_mm.
  PUBLIC SECTION.

    METHODS: constructor
                  IMPORTING im_dynpro         TYPE sy-dynnr
                            im_prog           TYPE sy-repid
                            im_priority       TYPE i OPTIONAL
                            im_foreign_prog   TYPE sy-repid
                            im_foreign_dynpro TYPE sy-dynnr
                            im_metafield      TYPE mmpur_metafield.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
    METHODS: build_dynpro_fields  REDEFINITION.
    METHODS: transport_from_model REDEFINITION.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: custom_metafield TYPE mmpur_metafield.
ENDCLASS.                    "lcl_custom_header DEFINITION
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
*       CLASS lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
*
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
CLASS lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.

    CALL METHOD super->constructor
      EXPORTING
        im_dynpro         = im_dynpro
        im_prog           = im_prog
        im_priority       = im_priority
        im_foreign_prog   = im_foreign_prog
        im_foreign_dynpro = im_foreign_dynpro.
    custom_metafield = im_metafield.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "CONSTRUCTOR
  METHOD build_dynpro_fields.
    DATA: l_dynpro_entry LIKE LINE OF my_dynpro_fields.
    l_dynpro_entry-metafield = custom_metafield.
    INSERT l_dynpro_entry INTO TABLE my_dynpro_fields.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "BUILD_DYNPRO_FIELDS
  METHOD transport_from_model.
    foreign_application_ok = mmpur_yes.

*    set model to function group
    processed_model = my_model.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "transport_from_model
ENDCLASS.                    "lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION

entry.title: Re: The detailed production orders information of WIP ATY
entry.content: Hello, your question has been forwarded to the experts. We hope to provide an answer soon. Kind regards, Jessica

entry.title: Re: Report on SAP Signavio Process Intelligence data using the new OData API and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
@hoangvu Thanks for the good blog article, sounds very exciting and meaningful.

Do you have a few examples where the connection to the SAC makes sense? 

Ragards,

Niels

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello, I'm from Cairo, Egypt. Cairo is a vibrant city known for its rich history, stunning architecture, and cultural heritage. It's home to the iconic pyramids of Giza, the bustling Khan El Khalili market, and the beautiful Nile River. Growing up in such a historic and lively place has given me a deep appreciation for both ancient traditions and modern urban life.

entry.title: Re: MDG - Edition Concept
entry.content: Any thoughts or feedback experts?

entry.title: Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
In this blog post I’d like to outline the innovations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 in the area of Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management. These are the topics that are covered:

  • Reserving Material Using Project Demand (4RF)
  • Creating a Project by Copying an Existing Project Using an API (1NT, 1YF)
  • Integration with Project Plan Collaboration (6JN)

Check out my video to get a glimpse of the new features:

 

 

Reserving Material Using Project Demand

To simplify project planning, we’ve built on our functionality for project demands. A project demand represents a certain need of a particular WBS (Work Breakdown Structure) element at a specific time and location. It enables you to plan, trigger and monitor your logistics in a single application within your enterprise projects.

Meanwhile, we offer 3 demand categories: Material, service and resource demands with different demand types to cover different business scenarios. In case you’re interested to learn more about project demands, please have a look at my dedicated blog post.

As part of the material demands, we introduce the new demand type “Project Stock, Reservation”. With this type, a project procurement controller has the option to reserve a certain quantity of a material for the project at a certain date. The respective material is reserved from project stock.

When the demand gets requested, the reservation item gets generated. With this release, we do have the restriction that the reservations which are generated out of the project do not generate requirements. However, with the upcoming releases we plan on having the functionality in place so that an MRP run reads the reservation and automatically triggers the requirements if needed.

Figure 1: The new demand type “Project Stock, Reservation” enables project procurement controllers to plan and reserve material for a project from project stock

 

 

Creating a Project by Copying an Existing Project Using an API

This highlight can be extremely time saving when creating projects. We have enhanced the already existing API “Enterprise Project” which you can make use of for enterprise projects as well as professional services projects. In addition to the functionality which was available even before this release, which is create, read, update and delete the project definition or the project elements of projects, we now also allow for the copying of projects.

When copying a project with this API, the API takes an existing project as reference and automatically creates a new project by copying this reference project. Along with the project, all parameters are copied as well such as the appropriate IDS, planned dates, the demands etc. Moreover, you have the possibility to copy settlement rules.

Figure 2: The enhanced “Enterprise Project” API allows for automatic creation of a project based on a reference project.

 

 

Integration with Project Plan Collaboration

With SAP Project and Resource Management (formerly known as SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects) we offer two services: project management and resource management.

With Project Management as part of SAP Project and Resource Management, you can manage the project from an execution point of view. What we now offer are public APIs to create project plans and allow for interaction from outside with the project plan functionality in SAP Project and Resource Management. Having this feature in place means that the integration in both directions is possible and you can easily access external tools to consolidate project information. As asynchronous processing is allowed, process efficiency is increased.

Moreover, we offer now as well direct integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition by direct API calls. With this we reduce TCO for our customers because the SAP Integration Suite is not a prerequisite anymore. Importing project plans can happen for enterprise projects as well as professional services projects. The user can create related object entries to allow for navigation between the user interfaces. On top of the initial import, we provide update functionality to keep existing project plans consistent in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Project and Resource Management.

Figure 3: The integration with “Project Plan Collaboration” via public APIs allows you to interact from outside with the project plan functionality in SAP Project and Resource Management.

 

 

Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative “SAP Project and Resource Management – Scheduling of Projects”

In case you want to learn more about this bi-directional integration and especially the project scheduling capabilities we offer as part of SAP Project and Resource Management, we highly recommend you to participate in the new Customer Engagement Initiative “

Figure 4: Join the SAP Customer Influence Program for SAP Project and Resource Management - Scheduling of projects.

 

 

More Information

If you are interested in the latest and greatest blog posts on Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management, please have a look at my collection blog and also take a look at the Community page for Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management (Project Control) and also check out the blog post on Professional Services published by my colleague Katharina Stopf.

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Community to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn and X.

 

📽 Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a 30-minute-long recording and a presentation for Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand – anywhere, anytime.

 

🔎Find All of Our Assets

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Here is my submission:

Preview of the CDS View Entity:

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hi @@notify

I have taken my frustration of SAP Learnings current focus as demonstrated by the comments above on making "things look pretty" and "using AI to make giving suggestions to people for possible career development opportunities" and decided to create the following the SuccessFactors Learning/ Improvement Request that would actually make our jobs as LMS administrators easier:

Import Job or addition of a Connector Description for Custom Fields descriptions upload/update

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/328839

Have a read on how I believe this issue could be solved, please comment to give us your thoughts and Vote for it, if you believe that it is something that would greatly benefit us the LMS administrators and improve the product overall.

Regards,

Nathan H.

PS: While on the topic of these enhancement Requests/ideas I am really getting frustrated with SAP focus on "Thank you for your idea submission! As our current focus is on Reimagining the User Experience, expanding our Skill and Capability based learning model, offering Intelligent Learning Recommendations and Opportunities across the SuccessFactors Suite, and providing the most modern tracking and reporting tools, this idea is not planned for delivery on the current roadmap. As we look to enhance this area of the learning process, we will review and consider your idea at that time".  

While we are waiting for enhancements that we have requested/supported like:

REQUEST SF SUPPORT FOR TIN CAN API
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/47258
Submitted on: Feb 1, 2017
Status:  Accepted
Votes:   228

Mass modification/deletion of History Data
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/221413
Status:  Accepted
Votes:   264
NOT ON THE ROAD MAP!

Instructor Record Learning and attachment supporting Documentation functionality in One Step Request ID: 206376, 
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/206376 
Status: For Long-term Consideration (Decision: "Under Review for Portfolio")
Votes:   101
Decision Date:  2022-12-23
Decision:    Next update in Q4/2023

Recording completions for multiple people
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/233122 
Status: For Long-term Consideration (Decision: Next update in Q4/2020)
Votes:   66
Decision Date:  2022-12-23
Decision:    Next update in Q4/2023

Custom Columns within Notification Template Tag
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/242704
Status:  For Long-term Consideration
Votes:   22
Decision Date:  2021-06-04
Decision:  Next update in Q2/2022

Integrate photographic capability on (a) mobile device with task checklist to attach evidence
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/206448 
Status: Acknowledged
Votes:   33
Decision Date:  2020-04-15
Decision:    Next update in Q1/2022

Allow a task observer to attach one or more files when recording learning
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/234558 
Status: Under Review
Votes:   56
Decision Date:  2020-02-07
Decision:    Next update in Q4/2021

(Record learning for) Licences (& other learning types) that have future issue date
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/218796 
Status: Under Review
Votes:   35

It is almost like SAP SuccessFactors Learning development team have gotten distracted by the "bright and shiny" new toy of Intelligent Learning Recommendations and have forgotten that this is a tool that a large majority of the companies use as a Compliance tool for their workforce!  Which in Australia with the new "industrial Manslaughter" legislation that is being rolled out across the country is of critical importance as the changes have massive impacts for individuals and companies alike.

 I almost feel like we are being "gaslighted" by SAP, in them accepting some of the above requests and then doing nothing with them!  It unfortunately seems to have been a long time since I have seen an enhancement in a release that improves the Learning Administration functionality of this Module!  Can anyone give me an example from the past few years as I would be happy to be proved wrong? 

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: jConnect version for HA functionality
entry.content: You tagged your question with SAP Java Connector, which I don't think has anything to do with your question.

entry.title: Re: SQL Database size suddenly increased SAP Business One
entry.content:
Please look at the SAP note 2078341: (How to Maintain Database and Log File Settings for SAP Business One)

https://me.sap.com/notes/2078341/E

entry.title: Acquired model variables do not filter data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm struggling to understand the point of model variables as they don't filter the data in an optimized SAC story +
when scheduling/bursting a story - the variable value also doesn't filter the story.

As an example using the planned events sample model I created a variable on City to prompt for a single City value.
It doesn't filter the story at all (yep I've checked the story table settings to for story vs widget variable options)
Scheduling the story and selecting the 'prompt' option to burst the story for different recipients also does nothing.

entry.title: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in expr
entry.content:
When I activate the code, it shows  The method "ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT" does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in expressions. The coding as following:

    CALL METHOD uo_model_holder->add
      EXPORTING
        im_screen_view = lo_custom_view
        im_position    = uo_model_holder->zzget_next_subview_count( ).

May I know what is wrong with the coding? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Budget Control at Purchase Requisition (PR) Level in...
entry.content:
Sorry.

Here is an updated link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/30cb8deab95e4d8c9420aeabb2ae496f.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: 🟠 Craft Enterprise Apps for iOS, iPadOS, and VisionOS with SAP Fiori and SAP Build Code
entry.content: Explore how to design and develop enterprise mobile applications for Apple platforms, including iOS, iPadOS, and visionOS. This session begins with an idea for an app and data, demonstrating how to apply SAP Fiori for iOS Design Guidelines to create an intuitive and visually compelling user interface. Leveraging SwiftUI and SAP BTP SDK for iOS, we will demonstrate the development process, ensuring your app delivers a seamless experience across various devices. By the end of the session, you will be equipped with the knowledge to build sophisticated, scalable, and efficient applications tailored to your enterprise's unique needs.

entry.title: Re: Inspection result was not transferred to batch classification with UD
entry.content: Can you check Maintain plant level setup  - 'Batch valuation without mat spec' must be ticked (if task list used).

entry.title: Re: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in
entry.content: The problem is exactly what the message says - the method has to implement a returning parameter if it is used in expressions.

entry.title: SAP Named a Leader in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Recurring Billing Applications
entry.content:
Just yesterday, Martin Barkman announced SAP was named a Leader in the first-ever 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Recurring Billing Applications. Gain access to the full report and read the announcement here. 

For our community of developers, partners, and users, we believe this recognition attests to the innovation and collaboration that drives our success. It’s a clear signal that we are on the right path, delivering solutions that not only meet but exceed market expectations. 

Why This Recognition Matters  

SAP stands out as the only true ERP vendor offering a top-tier recurring billing solution seamlessly integrated with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Our customers seamlessly connect their billing processes with other critical business functions via the end-to-end suite powered by SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Subscription Billing.  

Being named a Leader in Gartner®’s Magic Quadrant™ is a significant achievement, not just for SAP but for our entire ecosystem of customers, partners, and community members. For our customers, this recognition reaffirms the value of choosing SAP as their trusted partner for subscription billing and recurring revenue management. It signals that SAP is not only capable of meeting current market demands, but is also well-positioned to lead the industry in the years to come. 

This recognition is also a call to action. As leaders in the field, we have a responsibility to continue pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in subscription billing and recurring revenue management. We invite our community members to engage with us, explore our solutions, and share their insights and experiences. 

For our latest customer success stories and to learn more about our solution, visit our NEW SAP Subscription Billing community page.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )

entry.title: I am executing Rebate Settlement , Credit memo generated with negative value. Change in Rebate %
entry.content:
I am executing Rebate Settlement in s4/Hana, Credit memo generated with negative value.

Reason is the Change in Rebate contract percentage previously its 12% and now it 11%. 

Need to settle credit memo in positive.

entry.title: Re: OData service limitations
entry.content:
Check this docu: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/43509d67b8b84e66a30851e832f66911/7a453609c8694b029493e7d87e0de60a.html#parameters

There is a part for Analytic Models as well.

entry.title: Re: Query not working for Customer Specific Price List (G...
entry.content:
Hello Carlo,

Please have a look at this KBA: 3195901 - How to Query Campaign Specific Price List via the Web Service QuerySalesPriceListIn.  When querying a sales price list, the header key names has to be passed in the query. For customer specific price list, the header key name is Account. 

Kindly refer to the sample query in the KBA and adapt your query, and try again.

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Re: Different between service-binding and binding?
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: Different between service-binding and binding?
entry.content: Does not exist: Get the credentials for an instance: btp show services/instance --instance-name <instance-name> Invalid command: show services/instance

entry.title: Re: ABAP Debugger: organize the screen
entry.content:
Hi Jepy,

I expect you have some Buttons (Icons) at the right side of each part (tool) to organize the tools.

You should have a tabstrip above the tools. I've found your desired layout in the tabstrip with title "Desktop 1".

Kind regards,
Ulrich

entry.title: Re: Different between service-binding and binding?
entry.content: btp get services/instance does exist as command but not retrieve the credentials

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 beta program
entry.content:
See note 3485708

Back-end requirements

Please check following notes, if they are applicable to your backend system.

Source Editor (CL_GUI_SOURCEEDIT)

  • 3450882 - Editor: Java SAPGUI ABAP Edit Control support

In case of experiencing dumps when navigating to screens using CL_GUI_SOURCEEDIT like in ABAP Workbench, this note is required.
